name: Contrast Security
description: Application security testing platform. Monitor application vulnerabilities and compliance.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Contrast Security
2. Go to User Settings → Profile
3. Copy your API Key, Service Key, Username, and Organization ID
4. Paste all values below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Contrast → User Settings → Profile → API Key.

credentialFields.label: Service Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Contrast → User Settings → Profile → Service Key.

credentialFields.label: Organization ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Contrast → User Settings → Profile → Organization ID.

checks.name: Contrast Security App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Contrast Security API is accessible.

checks.name: Contrast Security Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies user access to Contrast Security.
